---
title: "Climatology and Oceanography"
subtitle: "Specialized study of Climatology and Oceanography for Semester V."
author: "Geography Team"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
---

{{< include climatology-and-oceanography/00-syllabus.md >}}

---

## Climatology

{{< include climatology/01-atmosphere-composition-structure.md >}}
{{< include climatology/02-insolation-and-heat-budget.md >}}
{{< include climatology/03-temperature-distribution.md >}}
{{< include climatology/04-atmospheric-pressure-and-circulation.md >}}
{{< include climatology/05-monsoons-and-jet-streams.md >}}
{{< include climatology/06-air-masses-and-fronts.md >}}
{{< include climatology/07-cyclones.md >}}

---

## Oceanography

{{< include oceanography/01-origin-of-ocean-basins.md >}}
{{< include oceanography/02-ocean-floor-relief.md >}}
{{< include oceanography/03-temperature-salinity-density.md >}}
{{< include oceanography/04-waves-tides-currents.md >}}
{{< include oceanography/05-sea-level-changes.md >}}

---
